title: myriopus microphyllus
intro: Myriopus microphyllus, also known as California bugloss, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Myriopus microphyllus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
